category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a ranger-like terminal file manager written in Rust; official repository README repeats this.
display_name_sources: Common display casing inferred from project name on official repository.
Official repository README heading is joshuto and source_facts.name is joshuto.
docs_sources: Official README documents installation, usage, configuration, and features.
Official repository contains a docs directory linked from README for usage and configuration.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has official repository https://github.com/kamiyaa/joshuto; per instruction, repo returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official repository topics/README identify TUI, ranger-like behavior, file previews, tabs, and file operations.
source_facts.description identifies a Rust terminal file manager.
